testcase.name: test new browser UI
testcase.system-out:
Empty state exists: [33mtrue[39m Agent input exists: [33mtrue[39m Tab bar exists: [33mfalse[39m
=== NEW BROWSER UI VERIFICATION === ✓ Browser loads from landing page ✓ Empty state shows when no tabs ✓ Agent input bar present at bottom ✓ Compact tab bar at top
